scripts.db:push:dev: DATABASE_URL="$(NODE_ENV=development node scripts/print-database-url.cjs)" npx prisma db push
scripts.db:migrate:dev: DATABASE_URL="$(NODE_ENV=development node scripts/print-database-url.cjs)" npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:migrate:deploy:prod: DATABASE_URL="$(NODE_ENV=production node scripts/print-database-url.cjs)" npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:sync:mobile:dev: DATABASE_URL="$(NODE_ENV=development node scripts/print-database-url.cjs)" NODE_ENV=development tsx src/scripts/syncMobileLocalData.ts
